benchmark_effective_env_nonsecret.cmd:
set -a; . ./.env; set +a; export AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT='gpt-4.1-mini'; export AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT='gpt-4.1-mini'; export ANSWER_MODEL='gpt-4.1-mini'; export JUDGE_MODEL='gpt-4.1-mini'; export CHAT_MODEL='gpt-4.1-mini'; export AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT='text-embedding-3-small'; export USE_QUERY_EXPANSION=1; unset INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY; unset LOCOMO_RETRIEVAL_TELEMETRY; unset USE_CONTEXT_RERANK; unset USE_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION; unset USE_GATED_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION; unset USE_LEGACY_CONTEXT_ASSEMBLY; python3 - <<'PY'
import os
keys=['AZURE_CHAT_ENDPOINT','AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT','AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT','ANSWER_MODEL','JUDGE_MODEL','CHAT_MODEL','AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT','AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT','USE_QUERY_EXPANSION','INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY','LOCOMO_RETRIEVAL_TELEMETRY','USE_CONTEXT_RERANK','USE_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION','USE_GATED_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION','USE_LEGACY_CONTEXT_ASSEMBLY']
for k in keys:
    print(f'{k}={os.environ.get(k, )}')
PY

ANSWER_MODEL=gpt-4.1-mini

CHAT_MODEL=gpt-4.1-mini
AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT=https://sector-7.openai.azure.com/
AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-3-small
USE_QUERY_EXPANSION=1
INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY=None
LOCOMO_RETRIEVAL_TELEMETRY=None
USE_CONTEXT_RERANK=None
USE_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION=None
USE_GATED_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION=None
USE_LEGACY_CONTEXT_ASSEMBLY=None

container_source_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; h=Path('/app/hybrid_retrieval.py').read_text(); s=Path('/app/server.py').read_text(); b=Path('/app/benchmark_scripts/locomo_bench_v2.py').read_text(); print('dynamic_self_vtype=' + str('\$1::{self.vtype}' in h)); print('hardcoded_vector=' + str('\$1::vector' in h)); print('serialize_result=' + str('def _serialize_result' in s)); print('decimal_import=' + str('from decimal import Decimal' in s)); print('include_recall_telemetry=' + str('INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY' in b)); print('legacy_context_arg=' + str('--legacy-context-assembly' in b)); print('nonlegacy_expanded_query_accumulation_guard=' + str('if not USE_QUERY_EXPANSION and len(base_seen) >= candidate_limit:' in b)); print('candidate_memories_extend=' + str('candidate_memories.extend(recalled)' in b)); print('final_candidates_cap=' + str('memories = candidates[:ANSWER_CONTEXT_TOP_K]' in b));"
container_source_probe.output:
dynamic_self_vtype=True
hardcoded_vector=False
serialize_result=True
decimal_import=True
include_recall_telemetry=True
legacy_context_arg=True
nonlegacy_expanded_query_accumulation_guard=True
candidate_memories_extend=True
final_candidates_cap=True

db_type_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -F '|' -c "SELECT 'embedding_type', data_type || ':' || udt_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='memories' AND column_name='embedding' UNION ALL SELECT 'ruvector_type_count', count(*)::text FROM pg_type WHERE typname='ruvector' UNION ALL SELECT 'vector_type_count', count(*)::text FROM pg_type WHERE typname='vector';"

git.cmd:
printf 'branch='; git branch --show-current; printf 'head_short='; git rev-parse --short HEAD; printf 'head_full='; git rev-parse HEAD; printf 'status=<<<'; git status --short --untracked-files=no; printf '>>>'; printf '
status_with_untracked=<<<'; git status --short; printf '>>>'

linked_counts.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "WITH locomo AS (SELECT id FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%') SELECT 'temporal_expressions|' || count(*) FROM temporal_expressions WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_snapshots|' || count(*) FROM memory_snapshots WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'user_feedback|' || count(*) FROM user_feedback WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'contradictions|' || count(*) FROM contradictions WHERE memory_a_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR memory_b_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_edges|' || count(*) FROM memory_edges WHERE source_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR target_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo);"

locomo_count.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "SELECT count(id) FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%';"

probe_correction_note: Initial source probe used an overly strict literal for the non-legacy break guard. Corrected probe checks the effective current-source guard: 'if not USE_QUERY_EXPANSION and len(base_seen) >= candidate_limit:' plus expanded-query loop/candidate accumulation fields.

server_env_selected_nonsecret.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server env | sort | grep -E '^(USE_RUVECTOR|AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT|AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT|AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT|CHAT_MODEL|EMBEDDING_MODEL|EMBEDDING_BASE_URL|INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY|LOCOMO_RETRIEVAL_TELEMETRY)=' || true

AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT=gpt-4.1-mini
AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-3-small
AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT=gpt-4.1-mini
CHAT_MODEL=gemma4:e4b
EMBEDDING_BASE_URL=http://ollama:11434/v1

USE_RUVECTOR=true
